```{r include=FALSE}
rm(list = ls())
library(fontawesome)
library(tictoc)
tic()

# Session working log is kept in SESSION_NOTES.md (local-only, gitignored).
# On each new Codex session, read SESSION_NOTES.md first before inferring prior context.
# Files that define the human-authored homepage content.
site_static_source_files <- c(
  "index.qmd",
  "_quarto.yml",
  "contact.html"
)
site_static_source_files <- site_static_source_files[file.exists(site_static_source_files)]
site_word_files <- site_static_source_files[grepl("\\.(qmd)$", site_static_source_files)]

read_utf8 <- function(path) {
  paste(readLines(path, warn = FALSE, encoding = "UTF-8"), collapse = "\n")
}

compute_version_hash <- function(paths) {
  paths <- sort(paths)
  payload <- paste(vapply(paths, function(p) {
    paste0(p, "::", read_utf8(p))
  }, character(1)), collapse = "\n@@\n")
  if (requireNamespace("digest", quietly = TRUE)) {
    digest::digest(payload, algo = "sha256", serialize = FALSE)
  } else {
    tf <- tempfile(fileext = ".txt")
    writeLines(payload, tf, useBytes = TRUE)
    unname(tools::md5sum(tf))
  }
}

count_source_words <- function(paths) {
  count_one <- function(path) {
    txt <- read_utf8(path)
    txt <- gsub("(?s)```\\{=html\\}\\s*(.*?)\\s*```", "\\1", txt, perl = TRUE)
    txt <- gsub("(?s)```.*?```", " ", txt, perl = TRUE)
    txt <- gsub("\\[(.*?)\\]\\((.*?)\\)", "\\1", txt, perl = TRUE)
    txt <- gsub("`[^`]*`", " ", txt, perl = TRUE)
    txt <- gsub("<[^>]+>", " ", txt, perl = TRUE)
    txt <- gsub("[#*_>~\\[\\](){}]", " ", txt, perl = TRUE)
    txt <- gsub("\\s+", " ", txt, perl = TRUE)
    m <- gregexpr("[A-Za-zÀ-ÖØ-öø-ÿ0-9]+(?:['’.-][A-Za-zÀ-ÖØ-öø-ÿ0-9]+)*", txt, perl = TRUE)
    length(regmatches(txt, m)[[1]])
  }
  sum(vapply(paths, count_one, integer(1)))
}

safe_html <- function(x) {
  x <- gsub("&", "&amp;", x, fixed = TRUE)
  x <- gsub("<", "&lt;", x, fixed = TRUE)
  x <- gsub(">", "&gt;", x, fixed = TRUE)
  x
}

format_timestamp <- function(x) {
  paste0(
    format(x, "%B %d, %Y, %H:%M:%S"),
    " ",
    tolower(format(x, "%p"))
  )
}

format_feed_date <- function(x) {
  if (is.null(x) || is.na(x) || !nzchar(x)) return("")
  x2 <- sub("\\.\\d+(?=Z$)", "", x, perl = TRUE)
  x2 <- sub("Z$", "+0000", x2)
  x2 <- sub(" GMT$", " +0000", x2)
  dt <- suppressWarnings(as.POSIXct(x2, format = "%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S%z", tz = "UTC"))
  if (is.na(dt)) {
    dt <- suppressWarnings(as.POSIXct(x2, format = "%a, %d %b %Y %H:%M:%S %z", tz = "UTC"))
  }
  if (is.na(dt)) {
    dt <- suppressWarnings(as.POSIXct(x, format = "%a, %d %b %Y %H:%M:%S %Z", tz = "UTC"))
  }
  if (is.na(dt)) return("")
  format(dt, "%b %d, %Y")
}

normalize_entry <- function(entry, fallback_title = "", fallback_url = "") {
  out <- list(
    title = fallback_title,
    link = fallback_url,
    date = "",
    ok = FALSE,
    source = "fallback"
  )

  if (is.null(entry) || !is.list(entry)) return(out)

  for (nm in intersect(names(out), names(entry))) {
    out[[nm]] <- entry[[nm]]
  }

  out$title <- if (!is.null(out$title)) as.character(out$title)[1] else fallback_title
  out$link <- if (!is.null(out$link)) as.character(out$link)[1] else fallback_url
  out$date <- if (!is.null(out$date)) as.character(out$date)[1] else ""
  out$ok <- isTRUE(out$ok)
  out$source <- if (!is.null(out$source) && nzchar(out$source)) {
    as.character(out$source)[1]
  } else if (isTRUE(out$ok)) {
    "cache"
  } else {
    "fallback"
  }

  out
}

same_entry_content <- function(a, b) {
  if (is.null(a) && is.null(b)) return(TRUE)
  if (is.null(a) || is.null(b)) return(FALSE)
  a <- normalize_entry(a)
  b <- normalize_entry(b)
  identical(
    list(title = a$title, link = a$link, date = a$date, ok = a$ok),
    list(title = b$title, link = b$link, date = b$date, ok = b$ok)
  )
}

fill_missing_entry_fields <- function(primary, fallback) {
  primary <- normalize_entry(primary)
  if (is.null(fallback)) return(primary)
  fallback <- normalize_entry(fallback)
  for (field in c("title", "link", "date")) {
    if (!nzchar(primary[[field]]) && nzchar(fallback[[field]])) {
      primary[[field]] <- fallback[[field]]
    }
  }
  primary
}

fetch_latest_entry <- function(feed_url, fallback_url, fallback_title) {
  out <- normalize_entry(NULL, fallback_title = fallback_title, fallback_url = fallback_url)

  fetch_xml_text <- function(url) {
    via_curl <- tryCatch({
      out <- system2(
        "curl",
        c("-L", "-s", "-A", "Mozilla/5.0", url),
        stdout = TRUE,
        stderr = FALSE
      )
      paste(out, collapse = "\n")
    }, error = function(e) "")
    if (nzchar(via_curl)) return(via_curl)
    tryCatch(
      paste(readLines(url, warn = FALSE, encoding = "UTF-8"), collapse = "\n"),
      error = function(e) ""
    )
  }

  extract_first_block <- function(x, pattern) {
    m <- regexpr(pattern, x, perl = TRUE)
    if (m[1] == -1) return("")
    regmatches(x, m)[1]
  }

  extract_first_tag <- function(x, tag) {
    p <- paste0("(?is)<", tag, "\\b[^>]*>(.*?)</", tag, ">")
    block <- extract_first_block(x, p)
    if (!nzchar(block)) return("")
    sub(p, "\\1", block, perl = TRUE)
  }

  decode_entities <- function(x) {
    x <- gsub("<!\\[CDATA\\[(.*?)\\]\\]>", "\\1", x, perl = TRUE)
    x <- gsub("&amp;", "&", x, fixed = TRUE)
    x <- gsub("&lt;", "<", x, fixed = TRUE)
    x <- gsub("&gt;", ">", x, fixed = TRUE)
    x <- gsub("&quot;", "\"", x, fixed = TRUE)
    x <- gsub("&#39;", "'", x, fixed = TRUE)
    trimws(x)
  }

  strip_tags <- function(x) {
    x <- gsub("(?is)<[^>]+>", " ", x, perl = TRUE)
    x <- gsub("\\s+", " ", x, perl = TRUE)
    trimws(x)
  }

  parse_with_xml2 <- function(url) {
    if (!requireNamespace("xml2", quietly = TRUE)) return(NULL)
    xml <- fetch_xml_text(url)
    if (!nzchar(xml)) return(NULL)
    doc <- tryCatch(xml2::read_xml(xml), error = function(e) NULL)
    if (is.null(doc)) return(NULL)

    find_first_text <- function(node, tags) {
      for (tag in tags) {
        hit <- xml2::xml_find_first(node, paste0("./*[local-name()='", tag, "']"))
        if (!inherits(hit, "xml_missing")) {
          txt <- trimws(xml2::xml_text(hit))
          if (nzchar(txt)) return(txt)
        }
      }
      ""
    }

    entry <- xml2::xml_find_first(doc, "//*[local-name()='entry' or local-name()='item']")
    if (inherits(entry, "xml_missing")) return(NULL)
    title <- find_first_text(entry, c("title"))
    atom_link <- xml2::xml_find_first(entry, "./*[local-name()='link'][@rel='alternate']")
    atom_href <- xml2::xml_attr(atom_link, "href")
    rss_link <- find_first_text(entry, c("link"))
    link <- if (!is.na(atom_href) && nzchar(atom_href)) atom_href else rss_link
    date_txt <- find_first_text(entry, c("published", "updated", "pubDate"))
    list(title = title, link = link, date = date_txt)
  }

  parse_with_regex <- function(url) {
    xml <- fetch_xml_text(url)
    if (!nzchar(xml)) return(NULL)
    entry <- extract_first_block(xml, "(?is)<entry\\b.*?</entry>|<item\\b.*?</item>")
    if (!nzchar(entry)) return(NULL)
    title <- decode_entities(extract_first_tag(entry, "title"))
    link_block <- extract_first_block(entry, "(?is)<link\\b[^>]*rel=['\"]alternate['\"][^>]*>")
    atom_href <- if (nzchar(link_block)) {
      sub("(?is).*?href=['\"]([^'\"]+)['\"].*", "\\1", link_block, perl = TRUE)
    } else ""
    rss_link <- decode_entities(extract_first_tag(entry, "link"))
    if (identical(atom_href, link_block)) atom_href <- ""
    link <- if (nzchar(atom_href)) atom_href else rss_link
    date_txt <- decode_entities(
      extract_first_tag(entry, "published")
    )
    if (!nzchar(date_txt)) date_txt <- decode_entities(extract_first_tag(entry, "updated"))
    if (!nzchar(date_txt)) date_txt <- decode_entities(extract_first_tag(entry, "pubDate"))
    list(title = title, link = link, date = date_txt)
  }

  parse_with_substack_archive <- function(url) {
    archive_url <- sub("/feed/?$", "/archive", url)
    html <- fetch_xml_text(archive_url)
    if (!nzchar(html)) return(NULL)

    title_block <- extract_first_block(
      html,
      "(?is)<a\\b[^>]*data-testid=['\"]post-preview-title['\"][^>]*>.*?</a>"
    )
    if (!nzchar(title_block)) return(NULL)

    href_hit <- regmatches(
      title_block,
      regexec("href=['\"]([^'\"]+)['\"]", title_block, perl = TRUE)
    )[[1]]
    link <- if (length(href_hit) >= 2) href_hit[2] else ""
    title <- strip_tags(decode_entities(sub("(?is)^.*?>(.*?)</a>$", "\\1", title_block, perl = TRUE)))

    comment_hit <- regmatches(
      html,
      regexec("data-href=['\"](https://[^'\"]+/p/[^'\"]+)/comments['\"]", html, perl = TRUE)
    )[[1]]
    if (length(comment_hit) >= 2 && nzchar(comment_hit[2])) {
      link <- comment_hit[2]
    }

    slug_hit <- regmatches(
      html,
      regexec("\\\\\"slug\\\\\":\\\\\"([^\\\\\"]+)\\\\\"", html, perl = TRUE)
    )[[1]]
    if (
      (!nzchar(link) || grepl("substack\\.com/home/post/", link)) &&
      length(slug_hit) >= 2 &&
      nzchar(slug_hit[2])
    ) {
      pub_home <- sub("/feed/?$", "", url)
      link <- paste0(pub_home, "/p/", slug_hit[2])
    }

    date_hit <- regmatches(
      html,
      regexec("(?is)<time[^>]*datetime=['\"]([^'\"]+)['\"]", html, perl = TRUE)
    )[[1]]
    date_txt <- if (length(date_hit) >= 2) date_hit[2] else ""

    if (!nzchar(title) || !nzchar(link)) return(NULL)
    list(title = title, link = link, date = date_txt)
  }

  combine_parsed_entries <- function(entries) {
    entries <- Filter(Negate(is.null), entries)
    if (!length(entries)) return(NULL)
    score_one <- function(x) {
      sum(nzchar(c(x$title, x$link, x$date)))
    }
    best <- entries[[which.max(vapply(entries, score_one, numeric(1)))]]
    for (entry in entries) {
      for (field in c("title", "link", "date")) {
        if (!nzchar(best[[field]]) && nzchar(entry[[field]])) {
          best[[field]] <- entry[[field]]
        }
      }
    }
    best
  }

  parsed_candidates <- list(
    parse_with_xml2(feed_url),
    parse_with_regex(feed_url)
  )
  if (grepl("substack\\.com/feed/?$", feed_url)) {
    parsed_candidates[[length(parsed_candidates) + 1]] <- parse_with_substack_archive(feed_url)
  }
  parsed <- combine_parsed_entries(parsed_candidates)
  if (is.null(parsed)) return(out)

  title <- parsed$title
  link <- parsed$link
  date_txt <- parsed$date

  if (!nzchar(title)) title <- fallback_title
  if (!nzchar(link)) link <- fallback_url

  out$title <- title
  out$link <- link
  out$date <- format_feed_date(date_txt)
  out$ok <- TRUE
  out$source <- "live"
  out
}

resolve_youtube_feed <- function(handle_url, fallback_feed) {
  fetch_html <- function(url) {
    # Prefer curl with a browser-like UA to avoid lightweight consent/blocked pages.
    via_curl <- tryCatch({
      out <- system2(
        "curl",
        c("-L", "-s", "-A", "Mozilla/5.0", url),
        stdout = TRUE,
        stderr = FALSE
      )
      paste(out, collapse = "\n")
    }, error = function(e) "")
    if (nzchar(via_curl)) return(via_curl)
    tryCatch(
      paste(readLines(url, warn = FALSE, encoding = "UTF-8"), collapse = "\n"),
      error = function(e) ""
    )
  }

  extract_id <- function(html) {
    pats <- c(
      '"channelId":"([^"]+)"',
      '"externalId":"([^"]+)"',
      '"browseId":"(UC[^"]+)"'
    )
    for (p in pats) {
      m <- regexec(p, html, perl = TRUE)
      hit <- regmatches(html, m)[[1]]
      if (length(hit) >= 2 && nzchar(hit[2])) return(hit[2])
    }
    ""
  }

  html <- fetch_html(handle_url)
  if (!nzchar(html)) return(fallback_feed)
  channel_id <- extract_id(html)
  if (nzchar(channel_id)) {
    return(paste0("https://www.youtube.com/feeds/videos.xml?channel_id=", channel_id))
  }
  fallback_feed
}

youtube_feed_url <- resolve_youtube_feed(
  "https://www.youtube.com/@ahyaentendi",
  "https://www.youtube.com/feeds/videos.xml?user=ahyaentendi"
)

fetch_first_live <- function(feed_urls, fallback_url, fallback_title) {
  for (u in unique(feed_urls)) {
    if (!nzchar(u)) next
    hit <- fetch_latest_entry(u, fallback_url, fallback_title)
    if (isTRUE(hit$ok)) return(hit)
  }
  fetch_latest_entry(feed_urls[1], fallback_url, fallback_title)
}

youtube_feed_candidates <- c(
  youtube_feed_url,
  "https://www.youtube.com/feeds/videos.xml?user=ahyaentendi",
  "https://www.youtube.com/feeds/videos.xml?user=drmartinlozano"
)

youtube_latest <- fetch_first_live(
  youtube_feed_candidates,
  "https://www.youtube.com/@ahyaentendi",
  "Open YouTube channel"
)

substack_latest <- fetch_latest_entry(
  "https://ahyaentendi.substack.com/feed",
  "https://ahyaentendi.substack.com/",
  "Open Substack"
)

cache_dir <- "data"
cache_path <- file.path(cache_dir, "latest-feeds.R")
legacy_cache_path <- file.path(cache_dir, "latest-feeds.rds")
if (!dir.exists(cache_dir)) dir.create(cache_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

read_feed_cache <- function(path, legacy_path = NULL) {
  if (file.exists(path)) {
    return(tryCatch(dget(path), error = function(e) NULL))
  }
  if (!is.null(legacy_path) && file.exists(legacy_path)) {
    return(tryCatch(readRDS(legacy_path), error = function(e) NULL))
  }
  NULL
}

write_feed_cache <- function(payload, path) {
  tryCatch(dput(payload, path), error = function(e) NULL)
}

ensure_cache_shape <- function(cache) {
  if (is.null(cache) || !is.list(cache)) return(NULL)
  list(
    updated_at = if (!is.null(cache$updated_at)) as.character(cache$updated_at)[1] else "",
    youtube = if (!is.null(cache$youtube)) normalize_entry(cache$youtube) else NULL,
    substack = if (!is.null(cache$substack)) normalize_entry(cache$substack) else NULL
  )
}

merge_live_with_cache <- function(current, cached_entry) {
  current <- normalize_entry(current)
  if (is.null(cached_entry)) return(current)
  cached_entry <- normalize_entry(cached_entry)
  if (isTRUE(current$ok)) {
    return(fill_missing_entry_fields(current, cached_entry))
  }
  if (!isTRUE(cached_entry$ok)) return(current)
  cached_entry$source <- "cache"
  cached_entry
}

build_cache_payload <- function(existing_cache, youtube_live, substack_live) {
  existing_cache <- ensure_cache_shape(existing_cache)
  existing_youtube <- if (!is.null(existing_cache)) existing_cache$youtube else NULL
  existing_substack <- if (!is.null(existing_cache)) existing_cache$substack else NULL

  next_youtube <- if (isTRUE(youtube_live$ok)) {
    fill_missing_entry_fields(youtube_live, existing_youtube)
  } else {
    existing_youtube
  }
  next_substack <- if (isTRUE(substack_live$ok)) {
    fill_missing_entry_fields(substack_live, existing_substack)
  } else {
    existing_substack
  }

  changed <- !same_entry_content(next_youtube, existing_youtube) ||
    !same_entry_content(next_substack, existing_substack)

  updated_at <- if (!is.null(existing_cache) && nzchar(existing_cache$updated_at)) {
    existing_cache$updated_at
  } else {
    ""
  }
  if (changed) {
    updated_at <- format(Sys.time(), "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S", tz = "UTC")
  }

  list(
    updated_at = updated_at,
    youtube = next_youtube,
    substack = next_substack
  )
}

feed_status_line <- function(entry) {
  entry <- normalize_entry(entry)
  if (!is.null(entry$date) && nzchar(entry$date)) {
    if (identical(entry$source, "cache")) {
      return(paste0(entry$date, " (cached)"))
    }
    return(entry$date)
  }
  if (identical(entry$source, "cache")) return("From cached snapshot")
  "Auto-updates when feed is reachable"
}

entry_title_html <- function(entry) {
  entry <- normalize_entry(entry)
  safe_html(entry$title)
}

entry_date_suffix <- function(entry) {
  entry <- normalize_entry(entry)
  if (!is.null(entry$date) && nzchar(entry$date)) {
    return(paste0(" (", entry$date, ")"))
  }
  ""
}

feed_cache <- ensure_cache_shape(read_feed_cache(cache_path, legacy_cache_path))
cache_payload <- build_cache_payload(feed_cache, youtube_latest, substack_latest)

has_cacheable_entry <- function(entry) {
  !is.null(entry) && isTRUE(normalize_entry(entry)$ok)
}

if (
  (!file.exists(cache_path) && (has_cacheable_entry(cache_payload$youtube) || has_cacheable_entry(cache_payload$substack))) ||
  !identical(cache_payload, feed_cache)
) {
  write_feed_cache(cache_payload, cache_path)
}

youtube_latest <- merge_live_with_cache(youtube_latest, cache_payload$youtube)
substack_latest <- merge_live_with_cache(substack_latest, cache_payload$substack)

site_source_files <- unique(c(site_static_source_files, cache_path))
site_source_files <- site_source_files[file.exists(site_source_files)]
site_hash <- compute_version_hash(site_source_files)
site_hash_short <- substr(site_hash, 1, 12)
site_word_count <- count_source_words(site_word_files)

old_lc_time <- Sys.getlocale("LC_TIME")
on.exit(try(Sys.setlocale("LC_TIME", old_lc_time), silent = TRUE), add = TRUE)
try(Sys.setlocale("LC_TIME", "C"), silent = TRUE)

site_modified_time <- if (length(site_source_files)) {
  suppressWarnings(max(file.info(site_source_files)$mtime, na.rm = TRUE))
} else {
  Sys.time()
}
if (!inherits(site_modified_time, "POSIXct")) {
  site_modified_time <- Sys.time()
}
site_modified <- format_timestamp(site_modified_time)
```

```{r global_options, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
knitr::opts_chunk$set(fig.pos = "H", out.extra = "")
```

```{=html}
<style>
:root {
  --bg-start: #eef5fb;
  --bg-end: #f7fbff;
  --ink: #132430;
  --muted: #4f6473;
  --accent: #005b88;
  --accent-soft: #d7ebf7;
  --card: #ffffff;
  --border: #cfe0ea;
  --shadow: 0 16px 34px rgba(10, 40, 58, 0.14);
}
#title-block-header {
  display: none !important;
}
.qf-hero {
  display: block;
  border: 1px solid #b9d4e4;
  border-radius: 18px;
  padding: 2rem;
  background: linear-gradient(140deg, #e8f3fb 0%, var(--bg-end) 60%, #ffffff 100%);
  box-shadow: var(--shadow);
  margin: 0.5rem 0 1.2rem;
}
.qf-kicker {
  display: inline-block;
  margin: 0 0 0.45rem;
  font-size: 0.74rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: 0.08em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: #0a4f73;
  background: #d7ebf7;
  border: 1px solid #b9d8ea;
  border-radius: 999px;
  padding: 0.22rem 0.58rem;
}
.qf-title {
  margin: 0 0 0.55rem;
  font-size: clamp(1.9rem, 3.2vw, 2.7rem);
  line-height: 1.15;
  color: var(--ink);
}
.qf-subtitle {
  margin: 0 0 0.25rem;
  color: var(--muted);
  font-size: 1.05rem;
}
.qf-metahead {
  margin: 0;
  color: var(--muted);
  font-size: 0.95rem;
}
.qf-metahead strong {
  color: var(--ink);
}
.qf-photo-wrap {
  justify-self: center;
}
.qf-photo {
  width: 178px;
  height: 178px;
  object-fit: cover;
  border-radius: 50%;
  border: 5px solid #fff;
  box-shadow: 0 14px 32px rgba(13, 47, 67, 0.22);
}
.qf-links {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: nowrap;
  gap: 0.4rem;
  margin: 1rem 0 0;
  overflow-x: auto;
}
.qf-main {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1.3fr 0.7fr;
  grid-template-areas:
    "kicker photo"
    "title photo"
    "subtitle photo"
    "metahead photo"
    "meta photo"
    "links photo";
  gap: 0.6rem 2rem;
  align-items: center;
}
.qf-kicker { grid-area: kicker; }
.qf-title { grid-area: title; }
.qf-subtitle { grid-area: subtitle; }
.qf-metahead { grid-area: metahead; }
.qf-meta { grid-area: meta; }
.qf-links { grid-area: links; }
.qf-photo-wrap { grid-area: photo; }
.qf-link {
  display: inline-block;
  padding: 0.3rem 0.58rem;
  border-radius: 999px;
  border: 1px solid #8db5cd;
  background: #ffffff;
  color: var(--accent);
  text-decoration: none;
  font-weight: 600;
  font-size: 0.82rem;
  white-space: nowrap;
}
.qf-link:hover {
  background: #e7f3fb;
  color: #003f5e;
  border-color: #5f97b7;
}
.qf-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
  gap: 1rem;
  margin-top: 1rem;
}
.qf-card {
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: 14px;
  padding: 1rem 1.1rem;
  background: var(--card);
  box-shadow: 0 6px 16px rgba(17, 55, 74, 0.07);
  border-top: 3px solid #4b8eb0;
}
.qf-card-research {
  border-top-color: #3f7f9f;
  background: linear-gradient(180deg, #f9fcfe 0%, #ffffff 35%);
}
.qf-card-tutorials {
  border-top-color: #4d8f87;
  background: linear-gradient(180deg, #f8fcfb 0%, #ffffff 35%);
}
.qf-card-tools {
  border-top-color: #8c7a43;
  background: linear-gradient(180deg, #fdfbf6 0%, #ffffff 35%);
}
.qf-card-contact {
  border-top-color: #6e7f8b;
  background: linear-gradient(180deg, #fafcfd 0%, #ffffff 35%);
}
.qf-card-media {
  border-top-color: #6f5f8f;
  background: linear-gradient(180deg, #fbf9fe 0%, #ffffff 35%);
}
.qf-card h3 {
  margin-top: 0.2rem;
  margin-bottom: 0.25rem;
  color: var(--ink);
}
.qf-card p {
  margin: 0 0 0.55rem;
  font-size: 0.92rem;
  color: var(--muted);
}
.qf-card ul {
  margin-bottom: 0;
  list-style: none;
  padding-left: 0;
}
.qf-card li + li {
  margin-top: 0.25rem;
}
.qf-card a {
  color: #00557a;
  text-decoration-color: #98c3d8;
}
.qf-note {
  color: var(--muted);
  margin-top: 0.9rem;
  font-size: 0.9rem;
}
.qf-intro {
  margin: 1rem 0 0.35rem;
  color: var(--ink);
  font-size: 1rem;
  line-height: 1.5;
}
.qf-meta {
  font-size: 0.8rem;
  color: var(--muted);
  margin-top: 0.7rem;
}
.qf-metrics {
  margin: 0.3rem 0 0.95rem;
}
.qf-metric {
  border: 1px solid #c6deec;
  border-radius: 10px;
  padding: 0.6rem 0.7rem;
  background: #f7fbfe;
}
.qf-metric-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  gap: 0.75rem;
}
.qf-metric-label {
  display: block;
  font-size: 0.76rem;
  text-transform: none;
  letter-spacing: 0.05em;
  color: #24485d;
  margin-bottom: 0.35rem;
}
.qf-metric-label a {
  display: inline;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: #003f5e;
  text-decoration-color: #7eaec8;
}
.qf-metric-grid a {
  display: inline;
  color: #003f5e;
  font-weight: 600;
  text-decoration: none;
}
.qf-metric-grid a:hover {
  color: #002d44;
  text-decoration: underline;
  text-decoration-color: #5e95b3;
}
.qf-metric-prefix {
  color: var(--muted);
  font-weight: 500;
}
.qf-metric-date-inline {
  color: var(--muted);
  font-size: 0.84rem;
}
.qf-contact-simple {
  margin-top: 1rem;
  padding: 0.95rem 1.1rem;
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: 12px;
  background: #ffffff;
  box-shadow: 0 4px 12px rgba(17, 55, 74, 0.05);
}
.qf-contact-simple h3 {
  margin: 0 0 0.35rem;
  color: var(--ink);
}
.qf-contact-simple p {
  margin: 0 0 0.55rem;
  color: var(--muted);
  font-size: 0.9rem;
}
.qf-contact-inline {
  margin: 0;
  color: var(--muted);
  font-size: 0.9rem;
  line-height: 1.5;
}
.qf-contact-inline a {
  color: #00557a;
  text-decoration-color: #98c3d8;
}
.qf-metric-date {
  display: block;
  margin-top: 0.12rem;
  font-size: 0.79rem;
  color: var(--muted);
}
@media (max-width: 900px) {
  .qf-hero {
    text-align: center;
  }
  .qf-main {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
  }
  .qf-grid {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }
  .qf-links {
    justify-content: center;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    overflow-x: visible;
    order: 3;
    margin-top: 1.1rem;
  }
  .qf-photo-wrap {
    order: 2;
    margin-top: 0.9rem;
  }
}
</style>
```

```{=html}
<section class="qf-hero">
  <div class="qf-main">
    <h1 class="qf-title">Dr. Martín Lozano</h1>
    <p class="qf-subtitle">Research, Teaching, and Resources in Quantitative Finance</p>
    <p class="qf-metahead">Modified: `r site_modified`</p>
    <div class="qf-meta">
      Version <code>`r site_hash_short`</code> ·
      Words <code>`r format(site_word_count, big.mark = ",")`</code>
    </div>
    <div class="qf-photo-wrap">
      <img class="qf-photo" src="foto mlozano.jpg" alt="Profile photo">
    </div>
    <div class="qf-links">
      <a class="qf-link" href="https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=w8boOboAAAAJ&hl=en" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">Scholar</a>
      <a class="qf-link" href="https://ssrn.com/author=1490785" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">SSRN</a>
      <a class="qf-link" href="https://github.com/mlozanoqf" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">GitHub</a>
      <a class="qf-link" href="http://www.linkedin.com/in/mlozanoqf" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">LinkedIn</a>
      <a class="qf-link" href="https://www.youtube.com/@ahyaentendi" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">YouTube</a>
      <a class="qf-link" href="https://ahyaentendi.substack.com/" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">Substack</a>
      <a class="qf-link" href="https://us02web.zoom.us/j/9209945512" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">Zoom</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>
```

```{=html}
<p class="qf-intro">
  I am a researcher and lecturer in quantitative finance, currently serving as Research Fellow at Alliance Manchester Business School, Teaching Fellow at SOAS University of London, and Professor of Finance at Universidad de Monterrey (UDEM). This site centralizes my academic work, tutorials in R, and practical tools for finance. It is designed for students, researchers, and practitioners.
</p>
```

```{=html}
<section class="qf-metrics">
  <div class="qf-metric">
    <span class="qf-metric-label">Latest from: Ah, ya entendí</span>
    <div class="qf-metric-grid">
      <div>
        <span class="qf-metric-prefix">YouTube:</span>
        <a href="`r youtube_latest$link`" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">`r entry_title_html(youtube_latest)`</a><span class="qf-metric-date-inline">`r entry_date_suffix(youtube_latest)`</span>
      </div>
      <div>
        <span class="qf-metric-prefix">Substack:</span>
        <a href="`r substack_latest$link`" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">`r entry_title_html(substack_latest)`</a><span class="qf-metric-date-inline">`r entry_date_suffix(substack_latest)`</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>
```

```{=html}
<section class="qf-grid">
  <article class="qf-card qf-card-research">
    <h3>Research</h3>
    <p>Academic profile and publications.</p>
    <ul>
      <li><a href="https://mlozanoqf.github.io/resume/">Curriculum vitae</a></li>
      <li><a href="https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=w8boOboAAAAJ&hl=en" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">Google Scholar profile</a></li>
      <li><a href="https://ssrn.com/author=1490785" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">SSRN author page</a></li>
      <li><a href="https://mlozanoqf.github.io/supervision/">Supervision guide</a></li>
    </ul>
  </article>

  <article class="qf-card qf-card-tutorials">
    <h3>Quant Finance with R</h3>
    <p>Structured tutorials in R for applied quantitative finance.</p>
    <ul>
      <li><a href="https://mlozanoqf.github.io/tutorial_arf/">Credit risk</a></li>
      <li><a href="https://mlozanoqf.github.io/tutorial_emf/">Forecasting</a></li>
      <li><a href="https://mlozanoqf.github.io/tutorial_if/">Options and VaR</a></li>
      <li><a href="https://mlozanoqf.github.io/tutorial_pmf/">Financial modeling</a></li>
    </ul>
  </article>

  <article class="qf-card qf-card-tools">
    <h3>Tools and Projects</h3>
    <p>Interactive applications and open repositories for applied finance.</p>
    <ul>
      <li><a href="https://mlozanoqf.shinyapps.io/opstr/" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">European options strategy analyzer</a></li>
      <li><a href="https://mlozanoqf.shinyapps.io/pass/" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">Mini Crypto Miner</a></li>
      <li><a href="https://edgar-mlozanoqf.streamlit.app/" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">EDGAR Explorer</a></li>
    </ul>
  </article>

  <article class="qf-card qf-card-media">
    <h3>Ah, ya entendí</h3>
    <p>Videos, essays, and code resources for applied finance.</p>
    <ul>
      <li><a href="https://www.youtube.com/@ahyaentendi" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">YouTube</a></li>
      <li><a href="https://github.com/mlozanoqf/ahyaentendi" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">GitHub</a></li>
      <li><a href="https://ahyaentendi.substack.com/" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">Substack</a></li>
    </ul>
  </article>
</section>
```
```{=html}
<section class="qf-contact-simple">
  <p class="qf-contact-inline">
    <strong>Contact:</strong>
    <a href="mailto:mlozanoqf@gmail.com">mlozanoqf@gmail.com</a> |
    <a href="mailto:martin.lozano@udem.edu">martin.lozano@udem.edu</a> |
    <a href="mailto:ml143@soas.ac.uk">ml143@soas.ac.uk</a> |
    <a href="mailto:martin.lozanobanda@manchester.ac.uk">martin.lozanobanda@manchester.ac.uk</a>
  </p>
</section>
```
